allow: PowerShell(gh pr list --repo teeswood/Proyectos --state open --json number,title,headRefName,createdAt)
PowerShell(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/teeswood/Proyectos/pulls?state=open" | Select-Object number, title, @{n='branch';e={$_.head.ref}}, created_at | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($prs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/teeswood/Proyectos/pulls?state=open"; $prs | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ number = $_.number; title = $_.title; branch = $_.head.ref; created_at = $_.created_at; url = $_.html_url } } | ConvertTo-Json)
